accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the Act as reauthorizing the CHD research program and adding reporting requirements.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes the extension of authorization and new reporting/strategy requirements.

effective_dates.why: Notes the 2-year deadline for the report and 1-year for the strategy after the report, plus FY2025-2029 reauthorization.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions including the report, strategy, consultation, and reauthorization.

concise.why: Very detailed; lists all sub-elements of the strategy requirements, making it longer than necessary for a summary.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names CDC, NIH, HRSA, the House and Senate committees.

correct_figures.why: Correctly states FY2025-2029 and the 2-year and 1-year deadlines.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
